title: humularia submarginalis
intro: Humularia submarginalis, also known as the sub-margin Humularia, is a plant species that belongs to the genus Humularia within the family Leguminosae. The plant has been traditionally used in West African medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Humularia submarginalis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
